SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-06-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-10-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 STIPULATED JUDGEMENT BETWEEN PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $1,400. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF JUL-11-2005, GRANTED
